title: Fresh Flower Pots x Mickey Joe's Flowers
description: Add-on for Fresh Flower Pots that adds support for Mickey Joe's Flowers
body:
# FRESH FLOWER POTS x MICKEY JOE'S FLOWERS

## 📜 ABOUT This Add-on for [Fresh Flower Pots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flower-pots) adds support for the [Mickey Joe's Flowers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-flowers) resource pack.
![All new models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/645683011445e862cacc49a130a7623db0993ba4.webp)

## ⚙️ INSTALLATION
**1.** Download [Fresh Flower Pots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flower-pots) and [Mickey Joe's Flowers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-flowers)\ **3.** Download this Add-on\ **4.** Put all packs in the resource packs folder and enable them in-game\ **5.** Make sure they are in this order: Add-on > Mickey Joe's Flowers > Fresh Flower Pots **NOTE:** This Add-on is currently not compatible with [Fresh Flower Pots: Rotated](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flower-pots-rotated)!

## ⚡ SERVER HOSTING Need a Minecraft server and want to support me? Sparked Host offers great performance at a fair price.\ Use code **BLUEHD** for **25% off**, or check them out **here**!
